name: Chat Room
description: Simple polling-based chat room with message history
backend_requirements: Access control: allow public read-only chat view; restrict sending messages to authenticated users
1. Message model: id, username, text, timestamp, is_active
2. GET /api/messages - return last 50 messages ordered by timestamp ascending
3. POST /api/messages - send a new message (authenticated users only); body: {username, text}
4. Store messages in SQLite; enforce max 1000 chars on text
frontend_requirements: Public guest view of chat with CTA to sign in for sending messages
1. Message list showing username, text, and formatted timestamp
2. Input field with send button at bottom (disabled for guests)
4. Poll GET /api/messages every 3 seconds for new messages
5. Show message count and last updated time

api_endpoints.description: Get recent chat messages (last 50, oldest first)
Send a new message (authenticated users only)

admin_requirements: 1. Admin overview list with total/active/inactive counts
2. Toggle active status for any message

admin_api_endpoints.description: Admin overview: list all messages and counts
